hero.title: Full Stack Developer · UI/UX & Creative Tech
hero.subtitle: Systems Analyst

paragraphs.p1: I am a developer and designer with a restless mind. I move between the visual and the technical, between sensitivity and logic. I’m drawn to understanding how things work, but also how they feel.
paragraphs.p2: I’m inspired by processes: imagining, taking things apart, putting them back together, shaping them.
paragraphs.p3: And I’m inspired by people: their stories, what they want to build, what they seek to express. I work with technology, but always from a human perspective.
paragraphs.p4: I appreciate the details that make everything work better.

exp1.title:
2020 — Pandemic
Bootcamp
exp1.description: My path started in a programming bootcamp. I built my first React projects, experimented with APIs and created small apps that sparked something in me: the feeling that I could turn ideas into something real.

exp2.title: 2021 — First job as a developer
exp2.description:
I landed my first IT job. I worked on:
UI design
React websites
Android apps in Kotlin
System maintenance in C#
It was my first professional experience building products for real people.

exp3.title: 2022–2024 — Systems Analyst
exp3.description: I kept studying and earned my Systems Analyst degree, diving deeper into architecture, logic, databases and good practices.

exp4.title: 2024 — Italy
exp4.description:
I moved to Italy to process my citizenship and continued working fully remote.
I learned to manage my time, communicate better and keep quality high even from a distance.

exp5.title: 2025 — Sardinia
exp5.description:
I stepped away from the technical side to reconnect with the human side.
I worked in hospitality, lived near the sea and adapted to a different rhythm.
That change of air brought back creativity, clarity and new energy to build.

exp6.title: Present
exp6.description:
Today I live in southern Italy as a freelancer.
I develop my own projects, study Prompt Engineering, build automations with N8N and bake artisanal croissants — because creating, in any form, is how I move through the world.

img1.title: Season in Sardinia
img1.subtitle: A stretch of sea, work and outdoor life. Changing the pace helped me get back to what matters.

img2.title: Citizenship and new beginnings
img2.subtitle: A long process that opened the doors to Europe and brought me to live here.

img3.title: Medialunas, just like home
img3.subtitle: A project born from play: cooking, creating, photographing and sharing a piece of Argentina.

foodie.summary: Foodie is a mobile application that generates personalized recipes based on available ingredients, dietary restrictions, and number of diners. Developed as an academic project, it delivers a functional prototype that simplifies daily meal planning and provides intelligent suggestions powered by Gemini AI. It also includes barcode scanning for regional products, making kitchen inventory management easier.
foodie.myRole: I designed the mockup and implemented it faithfully in the front‑end. I also contributed to the backend using Node.js, collaborating on the creation and integration of the API.

petinder.description: Mobile app for responsible pet adoption
petinder.summary: Petinder is an academic project designed to improve the process of responsible pet adoption. It addresses two major issues: the large number of animals living on the streets and the difficulty of matching each animal with the right adopter. The app also aims to reduce the high return rate, which often happens when the adopted pet does not adapt to the adopter’s lifestyle. Petinder helps connect people and animals more accurately, increasing the chances of a successful and lasting adoption.
petinder.myRole: I contributed to the front‑end development using React Native and Expo, implementing features such as maps and Firebase authentication. I also collaborated on the backend using Node.js, Express and Sequelize, working with a MySQL database.

erp.description: Web application focused on internal administration and management
erp.summary: This academic project involved developing a web application centered on the internal administration and management of a small business. The system allows handling key information such as employees, positions, management areas and cost centers, following a structured and process‑oriented approach. The focus was placed on organization, business logic and the correct implementation of administrative modules.
erp.myRole: I participated in all stages of the project: system structure design, entity creation, development of the main modules and database configuration. Additionally, I deployed the application, the database and the server on Azure.

personalPage.description: Responsive web page focused on UX, animations and storytelling
personalPage.summary: This project involved developing my personal website, an interactive experience designed to showcase my skills in UI/UX and advanced frontend development. The goal was to create smooth navigation with animations that support the visual narrative and reinforce the site's identity. The main challenge was integrating new technologies while achieving a responsive‑first design with fluid transitions and a clear structure.
personalPage.myRole: I designed and fully developed the website, implementing advanced animations with Framer Motion, responsive styling with Tailwind, and an internationalization system using i18n. I also built a dynamic timeline based on scroll calculations and optimized the visual experience across different devices.
